code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut total = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has_digit = false
mut stopped = false
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(line)

while i <= n
  mut b = -1
  if i < n
    b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      -1
    end
  end

  let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57

  if is_digit
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_digit = true
  else
    if has_digit and not stopped
      if total + cur <= 100
        total = total + cur
      else
        stopped = true
      end
    end
    cur = 0
    has_digit = false
  end

  i = i + 1
end

print("total=#{total}")
